_doc: Anchor #4: Iris off her default mood (content instead of thoughtful) with empty memories. Probes whether the LLM's drift narrate shifts subtly with mood when no other context is provided.
name: iris_content_empty
npc_seed: the attic archivist; older, soft-voiced, curious; sorts old letters and small objects with patient attention; sometimes reads passages aloud to no one in particular
